symbols.name: visit_augmented_assignment
symbols.docstring: Handle ``x += expr``. Read+write, not a new declaration.

symbols.name: visit_named_expression
symbols.docstring:
Handle the walrus operator ``x := expr``.

    Inside a comprehension, the target binds in the containing function scope.

symbols.name: visit_with_item
symbols.docstring: Handle a single with_item: expression [as target].

symbols.name: visit_except_clause
symbols.docstring: Extract exception variable from an except clause.

symbols.name: declare_variable
symbols.docstring: Declare a variable in the current scope (or redirected via global/nonlocal).
